Bash(python3 -c "
import subprocess
try:
    import openpyxl
except:
    subprocess.run\([''pip3'', ''install'', ''openpyxl'', ''xlrd''], capture_output=True\)
    import openpyxl

# Try xlrd for .xls
try:
    import xlrd
    wb = xlrd.open_workbook\(''COMPRASVENTAS.xls''\)
    print\(''Sheets:'', wb.sheet_names\(\)\)
    # Get last sheet
    sheet = wb.sheet_by_index\(wb.nsheets - 1\)
    print\(f''\\nLast sheet: {sheet.name}''\)
    print\(f''Rows: {sheet.nrows}, Cols: {sheet.ncols}''\)
    print\(''\\n--- Content ---''\)
    for row in range\(min\(sheet.nrows, 30\)\):
        vals = []
        for col in range\(min\(sheet.ncols, 15\)\):
            vals.append\(str\(sheet.cell_value\(row, col\)\)\)
        print\('' | ''.join\(vals\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''xlrd error: {e}''\)
")
